info.description: API server for SplitEasy app (Splitwise style expense sharing).
info.title: SplitEasy API

get.description: Returns recent expenses and settlements across the user's groups, newest first.

Handles the callback from Google OAuth2, exchanges authorization code for a session, then redirects to the frontend with the access and refresh tokens in the URL fragment (#access_token=...&refresh_token=...). The fragment is never sent to the frontend server, so neither token appears in access logs, CDN logs, or Referer headers.
Redirects client to Google OAuth2 consent page.

post.description: Revokes a refresh token so it can no longer be exchanged for a new session. Doesn't require a valid access token — a client whose access token has already expired still needs to be able to revoke its refresh token.
Exchanges a valid, unused refresh token for a new access token and a new refresh token (the old refresh token stops working, whether or not this call succeeds).

delete.description: Soft-deletes a comment. Only its author may delete it.

post.description: Adds a new expense to a group and splits it. split_method can be "equal" (default; splits among all members, or the given subset), "percentage" (splits values must add up to 100), "fixed" (splits values must add up to amount), or "shares" (splits proportionally to relative weights).

get.description: Retrieves a single expense by id. Any member of the expense's group may view it — unlike edit/delete, this isn't limited to the payer or split participants.

put.description: Replaces an expense's payer, description, amount, split, and items. Only the current payer or a current split participant may edit it.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an expense. Only the payer or a split participant may delete it.

get.description: Returns every comment on an expense, oldest first. Any member of the expense's group may view them.

post.description: Adds a comment to an expense. Any member of the expense's group may comment.

get.description: Retrieves all groups the authenticated user is a member of.
get.summary: List groups for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new group for sharing expenses. The authenticated user becomes its creator and first member.
Adds the authenticated user to the group identified by the invite token. Idempotent.
post.summary: Join a group via invite token

get.description: Retrieves list of expenses for a specific group.
Calculates the debts within a group to settle accounts.
Returns the share token and a join link for the group. Only group members can request it.
Returns every recorded payment in the group for the unified history view.

post.description: Records a payment between two group members, reducing their outstanding balance.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's overall balance and per-group net balances.

post.description: Parses a photographed or scanned receipt/ticket/invoice using AI and returns the extracted merchant, date, total and line items, for prefilling a new expense. Accepts both images and PDFs.
post.summary: Scan a receipt image or PDF

parameters.description: Receipt file (jpeg, png, webp, gif or pdf)
parameters.name: image

get.description: Retrieves a single settlement by id. Any member of the settlement's group may view it — unlike delete, this isn't limited to the two parties.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a recorded payment. Only the settlement's from_user_id or to_user_id may delete it — not just any group member.

get.description: Returns every comment on a settlement, oldest first. Any member of the settlement's group may view them.

post.description: Adds a comment to a settlement. Any member of the settlement's group may comment.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

category.description:
Category is the expense's category slug (empty for settlements) so the
feed can show the same icon the group history and detail views do.

id.description:
ID is the underlying expense's or settlement's id (whichever Type
says this event is), for opening the same detail view group history
rows link to.

category.description:
Category is one of ExpenseCategorySlugs; it drives the expense's icon
and grouping in the frontend.

users.description: Members this item is split among (equally).

category.description:
Category is the model's suggested expense category — always one of
ExpenseCategorySlugs (coerced to the default when the model returns
anything else). The user can still change it before saving.
